content.en:
Being able to enter the top 100 of the list of all things, placed in the entire Dark Sacred Domain, it is not an ordinary genius, but a genius who is enough to shake the Dark Sacred Domain, as long as it does not fall in the future, the Supreme Domain Ancestor is hopeful.

Of course, it is just hopeful, and it may not be able to really become the Strongest Domain Ancestor.

In the Dark Sanctuary, as long as you have talent and resources, it is not difficult to become a top domain ancestor, as long as you keep alive and go on for a long time, you will eventually be able to ascend to the top domain ancestor level.

But it is difficult to become a Supreme Domain Ancestor, it is not a realm that can be reached in time.

As everyone knows, for a long time in the Divine Heaven Realm, no Supreme Domain Ancestor has been born, which can be seen that it is very difficult to become a Supreme Domain Ancestor, even in the Dark Sacred Domain, it is extremely difficult.

Ye Tian did not continue to challenge the Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, but went to the Ninefold Battle Realm of the Battle Realm Tower.

In fact, the Ninefold Battle Realm is also an independent space, but it is an independent space dedicated to testing combat power.

Entering 10 points at a time, Ye Tian spent 10 points and came to the Nine Battles Realm.

The Ninefold War Realm is only open to the Returning Realm combat power, and if there is no Returning to the One Realm combat power, you won't even be able to withstand the first wave of attacks when you come in.

Whoa!!!

Ten opponents appeared in a row, and these opponents were all opponents condensed by the Battle Realm Tower.

The strength of these ten opponents is not very strong, much weaker than the half-step domain ancestor of the one-fold realm, but if they join forces, there is almost no weakness, and without the combat power of the one-fold one-realm half-step domain ancestor, they can't beat them at all.

Ye Tian was not interested in fighting with these weaker opponents, so he stabbed out with a spear and killed these ten opponents in an instant.

Then, ten more opponents appeared, much stronger than the ten opponents just now.

Spike!

Spike!

Spike!

......

Ye Tian showed his terrifying combat power and defeated wave after wave of opponents.

Defeating the first wave of opponents is equivalent to returning to one realm and a half-step domain ancestor.

And at this moment, he had already defeated the fifth wave of opponents, which was equivalent to a half-step domain ancestor of the five-fold return realm.

Then, he ushered in the sixth wave of opponents, and it took a little time to kill all six waves of opponents.

Soon, the seventh wave of opponents arrived.

Once the seventh wave of opponents is defeated, it means that he has the combat power of the Sevenfold Return to One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor.

In the Battle Tower, even the top ten powerhouses in the list of all things are difficult to defeat the seventh wave of enemies, if they are in the outside world, they can kill them, but they can't use other treasures and hole cards here, they can only rely on their own strength, so it is difficult to kill them.

Maybe the top three of the top three can kill four or five people, or seven or eight people.

"I don't know if I can kill them!"

Ye Tian muttered.

"Mixed Element Holy Body, open!"

Ye Tian showed all his powers except for the power of the Extreme Dao.

Thundered!!!!

The battle kept fighting, and Ye Tian was completely suppressed by these ten opponents.

With his own strength alone, he didn't have the combat power of the Sevenfold One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor at all, if he continued to fight like this, he would be killed by these ten opponents in less than a minute.

"The power of the Extreme Dao, open!"

Ye Tian shouted.

Rumble!!!!

With the blessing of the power of the Extreme Dao, Ye Tian exploded the body of an opponent with a single blow of the Dark Extreme Dao Spear, killing the opponent.

Then, Ye Tian killed these opponents one by one.

It didn't take long for all ten of his opponents to die, and he suffered only minor injuries.

At this moment, Ye Tian roughly estimated his strength.

Without using the power of the Extreme Dao, he was probably equivalent to the top-notch Sixfold One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor combat power, and this strength could probably be ranked in the top thirty.

If he uses the power of the Extreme Dao, he can step into the Sevenfold Return to One Realm and the half-step domain ancestor combat power, and it is estimated that he can rank in the top three or even the first.

Because he didn't dare to guarantee that the top three geniuses on the list of all things would not have hidden strength, maybe the other party also had the combat power of the seven-fold one-realm half-step domain ancestor?

The Sevenfold Returning to One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor's combat power seems to be very strong, but in the history of the Dark Sacred Domain, even the Ten Thousand Things Realm genius with the Eightfold Returning to One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor's combat power has been born, so his strength is not considered to be against the sky.

Knowing his combat strength, Ye Tian left the Nine Battles Realm satisfied.

Returning to the Dou Zhan Tai, he began to continue to challenge the Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor.

With the passage of time, a Half-Step Domain Ancestor of the Five-Fold Returning Realm was defeated by Ye Tian, and almost none of the Half-Step Domain Ancestors of the Five-Fold Returning Realm accepted Ye Tian's challenge.

As a result, Ye Tian set his sights on the Sixfold Returning to One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, and every time he deliberately pretended to defeat the enemy with difficulty.

In this way, many Sixfold Returning to One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors thought that they could defeat Ye Tian and challenged Ye Tian one by one, but they all failed.

When Ye Tian defeated a top six-fold Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, the Battle Realm Tower saw that his ranking had risen to the seventeenth place on the Ten Thousand Things List.

After defeating so many opponents, Ye Tian now has a lot of points, more than 60,000 points.

Now many people can see that Ye Tian is deliberately hiding his strength and attracting the half-step domain ancestors of the Sixfold One Realm to play, so as to defeat them one by one, and while gaining fame, he also gained a lot of points.

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, let me challenge you!"

A hundred-foot Guiyi Realm half-step domain ancestor with a height of 100 zhang appeared in front of Ye Tian and said.

"It's the White Blade Dao Ancestor, he actually wants to challenge the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor!!"

"The White Blade Dao Ancestor is known as the invincible existence of the Sixfold Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, even if the weaker Sevenfold Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor can defeat him, it is very difficult to kill him!"

"Yes, the speed of the White Blade Dao Ancestor is too fast, comparable to the speed of the Sevenfold Returning to One Realm and a half-step domain ancestor!"

From the words of the other half-step domain ancestors around him, as well as his understanding of the achievements of the White Blade Dao Ancestor, he knew that this was an invincible existence of a half-step domain ancestor of the Sixfold Return to One Realm.

But once he defeated the other party, he was afraid that he could directly be promoted to the top ten of the list of all things, thus attracting the attention of the top ten holy gates.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian agreed, but said again: "If you challenge, we will bet 50,000 points, do you dare?"

"50,000 points, it's nothing, I bet!"

The White Blade Dao Ancestor said with a smile.

For the exchange between the White Blade Dao Ancestor and the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, many people were very interested and came to watch the battle one by one.

The dense half-step domain ancestors came out of the independent spaces one by one and watched the battle one after another.
